name: Uoki Co.,Ltd.
summary: Uoki Co.,Ltd. engages in the retail sale of seafood in Japan. It offers sushi and prepared side dishes. The company also operates restaurants. It operates 41 fresh fish retail stores and 6 restaurants. The company was formerly known as K.K. Uoki Suisan and changed its name to Uoki Co.,Ltd. in 1990. Uoki Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Fujisawa, Japan.
